rationale: Both candidates independently discover the unswept get_cache_scale caller in the diffusion transformer, correctly hitting the latent gap the human reviewers missed. Y frames it as a severity-tagged blocker with concrete, evidence-cited fix guidance mirroring the mammoth_moda2 pattern, plus additional well-grounded test-coverage and comment-accuracy findings, giving it broader recall and stronger actionability. X compensates with impressive grounding against the actual upstream vLLM AutoWeightsLoader/fp8 mapper source to validate the core design, but its parallel gap finding is muddied by an unverified 'already fixed on main' claim, slightly hurting precision.
